name: Zoltan Varga-Mendes
summary: Dedicated Mid-level Flutter Developer with over 4 years of experience building high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. Proven track record in optimizing UI rendering and integrating complex RESTful APIs to deliver seamless user experiences.

experience.title: Flutter Developer
experience.description: Lead the development of a fintech mobile application using Flutter, focusing on state management with BLoC and improving app startup time by 30 percent.

experience.title: Junior Mobile Engineer
experience.description: Collaborated in a team of five to migrate a legacy native Android app to a unified Flutter codebase, resulting in significant maintenance cost reductions.

experience.title: Software Intern
experience.description: Assisted in the UI design and implementation of internal productivity tools using Dart and Flutter, gaining foundational knowledge in mobile architecture.
